The Book

Written from inside
the storm

Over Chaos & Doubt is not a clinical manual. It's a companion for the 3am moments, the school calls, and the quiet grief of watching your child struggle — with no map.

₹ 1,299 Paperback · Free shipping India

Book
The Book

Over Chaos & Doubt

Written for parents who are done searching and ready to understand. Not a clinical manual — a companion for the moments between appointments.

₹ 1,299Paperback
Free shipping in India
Inside the book

What you'll find

—

Understanding OCD Completely

What it is, how it works, and why what you think you know might be incomplete.

—

Real Scripts for Hard Moments

Word-for-word guides for refusals, meltdowns, school conflict, and family tension.

—

Supporting ERP at Home

How to be part of the solution without accidentally becoming part of the problem.

—

Self-Care for the Parent

Because your wellbeing matters in this too. Grief, exhaustion, and genuine renewal.

—

Digital Companion Portal

Access to exclusive digital resources, card templates, and audio grounding guides.

—

Navigating the System

Finding the right therapist, asking the right questions, and advocating effectively.

Tools
Toolkit

Tools for the in-between

Physical and digital resources for parents — designed for the dinner table, the car, and the bedtime routine.

✦ Complete Kit

Co-Navigation Kit

The complete physical toolkit — card decks, routine sheets, parent workbook, and audio sessions. Everything in one box.

₹ 2,499
🃏 Cards

Script Cards

52 laminated cards with real scripts for common difficult moments. Keep them in your pocket, your car, your kitchen.

₹ 799

Audio Companion

Guided grounding exercises, meditations, and short audio lessons from OCD-specialized therapists.

Categories
School Refusal ERP Support Medication Sibling Impact Accommodation
School Refusal2h ago

How do you handle mornings when your child refuses to leave the house?

We're in week 3 of school refusal. His therapist says don't force it but the school is calling daily…

💬 14 replies❤️ 28
ERP Support5h ago

My daughter cried through her entire session. Is this normal for ERP?

Her therapist says it's a sign the treatment is working but it's so hard to watch. Anyone else been here?

💬 22 replies❤️ 41
Accommodation1d ago

Realizing we've been accommodating for years without knowing it had a name

Reading the book was a turning point. We didn't know we were making things worse by trying to help…

💬 38 replies❤️ 72
Sibling Impact2d ago

How do you explain OCD to your other children?

My 11-year-old is frustrated that we give her brother "special treatment." I don't know how to help her understand…

💬 19 replies❤️ 33

Help
Find a Therapist

Specialists who truly
know OCD

Not all therapists treat OCD with ERP — the gold-standard approach. Our directory lists those who do.

Please note: Always verify therapist credentials independently. This directory is a starting point, not a clinical recommendation. Do your own research before engaging any professional.
